description_long: This skateboard features a standard double-kick deck with a vibrant, detailed graphic on the underside, showcasing a mix of cartoonish and graffiti-inspired artwork in red, blue, white, and black tones. The deck appears to be constructed from layered wood, with a black grip tape covering the top surface for traction. The skateboard is equipped with four white, classic street-style wheels attached to silver standard trucks, which are mounted with visible hardware. The trucks and wheels are proportionate to a typical street skateboard, designed for tricks and urban riding. The edges of the deck show a natural wood finish, contrasting with the bold graphic and black grip tape. No visible brand logo is present, but the deck art is highly stylized and eye-catching.
description: A standard street skateboard with a bold, colorful graphic on the underside, black grip tape on top, white wheels, and silver trucks. The deck features layered wood construction and graffiti-style artwork.
description_view_0: The underside of the skateboard is visible, displaying a vibrant, multi-colored graphic and both sets of trucks and wheels.
description_view_1: The skateboard is shown from the side, highlighting the black grip tape on top and the profile of the deck's concave shape.
description_view_2: A rear-angled view focusing on the plain black grip tape and the curvature of the deck, with minimal visibility of the wheels.
description_view_3: The underside graphic is partially visible along with the wheels and trucks, emphasizing the deck's layered wood edge.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The underside of the deck features a bold, graffiti-inspired graphic with cartoonish characters, abstract shapes, and a mix of red, blue, white, and black colors. The design is busy and eye-catching, with no visible text or branding.
attribute_wheel_type: classic street wheels, white, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard silver trucks, traditional kingpin, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black grip tape with no visible patterns, graphics, or text
